# ProbeMCP Milestones

Use these milestones for backlog triage:

- `v0.1`: local MCP server, safe structured tools, GDB/MI core, Cortex-M fault MVP, QEMU demo.
- `v0.2`: client compatibility, stronger analyzers, SVD peripheral intelligence, parser hardening.
- `future`: RTOS depth, multi-board lab orchestration, hosted workflows, commercial boundaries.
- `research`: vendor backend investigations that need transcript or hardware evidence.

GitHub milestones are repository metadata. This file is the source of truth when
permissions or automation prevent direct metadata updates.
